Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 239 

UNCOMPD_CARE_PYMT_AMT 

LABEL: Uncompensated Care Payment Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The field represents the uncompensated care amount (rounded to whole dollars) of the payment for 
disproportionate share hospitals (DSH) hospitals. 

SHORT NAME: UNCOMPD_CARE_PYMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: UNCOMPD_CARE_PYMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Uncompensated care payments are
